messages.content: Hi there! How can I help you today?
TecX LM is a Language Model of TecX.
TecX is abbreviation of Technology Engineering Computation Expansion.
TecX is the logo of TecX Trade name.
TecX provides services for Technology Engineering Computation domains.
First select one domain, In which you requires service.
I want service in Technology Engineering domain.
ok, What type help, do you want?
I want to know about latest available technology option.
Ok, For which field are you searching?
oK, Mechanical engineering is very essential domain of engineeering.
